scripts.dev: export BACKEND_PORT=3100 FRONTEND_PORT=3105 CLAWUI_DATA_DIR=.clawui_dev && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.release: export BACKEND_PORT=3110 FRONTEND_PORT=3115 CLAWUI_DATA_DIR=.clawui_release && npm run build && concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run version:meta && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.start:backend: cd backend && PORT=3110 CLAWUI_DATA_DIR=.clawui_release npm start
